description: Practice building glassmorphism interfaces with backdrop-filter

challenges.title: Frosted Navigation Bar
challenges.description: Build a fixed navigation bar with a frosted glass effect. The navbar should have: (1) position: fixed at the top, (2) semi-transparent background with rgba, (3) backdrop-filter: blur() for glass effect, (4) a subtle bottom border, (5) at least 3 navigation links inside.
hints: Use position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100% for the sticky effect
backdrop-filter: blur(10px) is a good starting value
Background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1) for light theme or rgba(0,0,0,0.3) for dark
Make sure to add a border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)
challenges.starterCode:
MyApp
Home About Contact
challenges.solution: nav.frosted-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; padding: 16px 24px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); z-index: 100; } nav.frosted-nav .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } nav.frosted-nav a { color: #333; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; }

challenges.title: Glassmorphism Pricing Card
challenges.description: Create a pricing card with glassmorphism styling. Requirements: (1) a gradient background behind the card, (2) the card has backdrop-filter with blur and saturation, (3) a price, features list, and CTA button, (4) subtle border and rounded corners, (5) a hover effect that slightly changes the backdrop-filter.
hints: Use a gradient background on the parent container
Combine blur() with saturate() for vibrant glass effect
Add a transition on backdrop-filter for smooth hover change
Use rgba(255,255,255,0.15) for the card background
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2) enhances the glass look
challenges.starterCode:

challenges.solution: .pricing-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); min-height: 400px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 40px; } .pricing-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(1.5); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(1.5); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px; text-align: center; color: white; max-width: 320px; transition: backdrop-filter 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .pricing-card:hover { backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.8); transform: translateY(-4px); } .pricing-card ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 24px 0; } .pricing-card li { padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .pricing-card button { background: white; color: #764ba2; border: none; padding: 12px 32px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }

challenges.title: Safari-style Reader Modal
challenges.description: Build an article reader modal similar to Safari's reader mode using backdrop-filter. Requirements: (1) page with article content and images, (2) a 'Reader Mode' button that triggers a slide-in overlay, (3) the overlay uses backdrop-filter to blur the background content, (4) clean typography and comfortable reading experience, (5) smooth open/close animation, (6) proper scroll handling when modal is open.
hints: Use position: fixed for the reader overlay with inset: 0
Use a CSS transition or animation for smooth open/close
Add overflow: hidden on body when modal is open to prevent background scroll
Consider using @supports to handle browsers without backdrop-filter
challenges.starterCode:

challenges.solution: /* CSS */ .reader-overlay { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(8px) brightness(0.6); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px) brightness(0.6); z-index: 1000; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s ease; } .reader-overlay.active { display: flex; opacity: 1; } .reader-content { background: #fff; color: #333; max-width: 720px; width: 90%; max-height: 85vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 40px; border-radius: 16px; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(20px); transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .reader-overlay.active .reader-content { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); } body.modal-open { overflow: hidden; } /* No backdrop-filter fallback */ @supports not (backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) { .reader-overlay { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); } } /* JS: document.getElementById('readerBtn').onclick = () => { document.getElementById('readerOverlay').classList.add('active'); document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); } */
